prediction.reasoning: JNJ is a large-cap healthcare stock with relatively low volatility (beta ~0.7). Based on historical volatility of approximately 15-18% annually and mean-reverting tendencies of blue-chip stocks, I estimated a 20-day forward price using geometric Brownian motion assumptions. The point estimate reflects slight positive drift typical of dividend-paying healthcare stocks. Confidence intervals account for daily volatility of ~1.1% and incorporate broader market uncertainty factors affecting pharmaceutical companies.
